top_signals.title: Strike, Counterstrike, Repeat
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Adversarial. Every other week, we’ll provide you with expert analysis on America’s greatest challengers: China, Russia, Iran, North Korea, and jihadists. Read more below.***Iran Hostilities have increased notably in the last few days, effectively ending the U.S.-Iranian truce that had somewhat held since April. At the start of June, fighting further intensified between Israel and Hizballah in Lebanon, complicating U.S.-Iranian negotiations, as Iran has insisted on linking U.S.-Iranian talks with an end to Israeli actions against Hizballah. The fighting in Lebanon led to Israel and Iran trading direct strikes on June 7. Then, on June 8, Iran reportedly

The post Strike, Counterstrike, Repeat appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.

top_signals.title: Banknote imagery advisory group minutes – 15 December 2025
Tokio Marine to team with Berkshire on M&A in Australia, Canada, CEO says
New Wharton forecast puts Social Security trust fund depletion later than official projections
top_signals.summary: Social Security's retirement trust fund may dry up in February 2033, according to a new report from the Penn Wharton Budget Model shared exclusively with CNBC.

top_signals.title: KNDS proposes mixed French-German tank to replace France’s Leclerc
top_signals.summary: The French-Germany company plans for an in-house active protection system and the ability to change out the 120mm gun with a 140mm variant.

top_signals.title: SpaceX snaps up AI coding darling Cursor as valuation soars past Amazon
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX has overtaken Amazon to become the world’s fifth-largest listed company after a blistering post-IPO rally, as the newly public firm unveiled a $60bn (£45bn) takeover of AI coding start-up Cursor. Shares in Musk’s rocket and AI giant rose more than eight per cent in pre-market trading on Tuesday, extending a surge that [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ex-Lush chief’s lawyers hike costs to ensure their AI model isn’t trained by juniors
top_signals.summary: Lawyers for the former chief executive of cosmetics giant Lush, Andrew Gerrie, have hiked their fees ahead of a trial this month, partly as they will not allow junior staff to train their AI model, City AM can reveal.  A court heard this morning that Gerrie’s legal team from Brown Rudnick have pushed up a [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
